tasks.subject: Task 1: Relocate setup skill, disable auto-invoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move the setup skill under `skills/` and add `disable-model-invocation: true` so it no longer auto-competes during editing.

**Files:**
- Move: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/SKILL.md` -> `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/skills/dataverse-xml-lsp-setup/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/SetupSkill.Tests.ps1`
- Modify: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/README.md:52`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Root SKILL.md moved via git mv; frontmatter has name + disable-model-invocation: true; plugin.json skills is ["./skills/dataverse-xml-lsp-setup"] and valid JSON; SetupSkill.Tests.ps1 passes against new path with disable-flag assertion.

**Verify:** `pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/SetupSkill.Tests.ps1"` -> all pass. Full code in plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/SKILL.md", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/skills/dataverse-xml-lsp-setup/SKILL.md", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/SetupSkill.Tests.ps1", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/SetupSkill.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Root SKILL.md moved to skills/dataverse-xml-lsp-setup/SKILL.md via git mv", "frontmatter has name + disable-model-invocation: true", "plugin.json skills is [./skills/dataverse-xml-lsp-setup] and valid JSON", "SetupSkill.Tests.ps1 passes against new path with disable-flag assertion"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add dataverse-xml-validate usage skill
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add an auto-triggering `dataverse-xml-validate` skill that surfaces the validator and how to read its output.

**Files:**
- Create: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/skills/dataverse-xml-validate/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Create: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/UsageSkill.Tests.ps1`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SKILL.md has name dataverse-xml-validate and a non-empty folded description; body has command + when-to-run + how-to-read-output + guide.md pointer, no ribbon recipe; plugin.json skills lists both dirs and both exist; UsageSkill.Tests.ps1 passes.

**Verify:** `pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/UsageSkill.Tests.ps1"` -> all pass. Full skill body + test code in plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/skills/dataverse-xml-validate/SKILL.md", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/UsageSkill.Tests.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/UsageSkill.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SKILL.md has name dataverse-xml-validate and non-empty description", "body has command + when-to-run + how-to-read-output + guide.md pointer, no ribbon recipe", "plugin.json skills lists both dirs and both exist", "UsageSkill.Tests.ps1 passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add PostToolUse wrapper-validation hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship a `PostToolUse` hook that auto-runs the validator only on edited `.xml` files whose root is one of the six validator-owned roots, surfacing failures via exit 2.

**Files:**
- Create: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/hooks/validate-wrapper.mjs`
- Create: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/hooks/hooks.json`
- Create: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/Hook.Tests.ps1`
- Create: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/fixtures/invalid/visualization-wrapper.xml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- hooks.json registers PostToolUse Edit|Write|MultiEdit -> node validate-wrapper.mjs; gate exits 0 for no-path/non-xml/non-owned root; six owned roots valid->0 invalid->2 with output; case-sensitive (ImportExportXml excluded, importexportxml included); pwsh spawn failure -> exit 0.

**Verify:** `pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/Hook.Tests.ps1"` -> all pass (validator cases skip if node/schemas absent). Full script + test + fixture in plan Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/hooks/validate-wrapper.mjs", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/hooks/hooks.json", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/Hook.Tests.ps1", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/fixtures/invalid/visualization-wrapper.xml"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/Hook.Tests.ps1\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hooks.json registers PostToolUse Edit|Write|MultiEdit -> node validate-wrapper.mjs", "gate exits 0 for no-path/non-xml/non-owned root", "six owned roots: valid->0, invalid->2 with output", "case-sensitive ImportExportXml excluded, importexportxml included", "pwsh spawn failure -> exit 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Release 2.1.0 (version, changelog, docs)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the change as 2.1.0 and correct docs that describe the old behaviour.

**Files:**
- Modify: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md`
- Modify: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/docs/guide.md:3`
- Modify: `plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- plugin.json version is 2.1.0; CHANGELOG 2.1.0 entry covers usage skill + hook + setup disable-flag; guide.md stale note corrected; README mentions usage skill and hook; full plugin Pester suite green.

**Verify:** `pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp"` -> all pass; `grep '"version"' plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` shows 2.1.0. Full text in plan Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "CHANGELOG.md", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/docs/guide.md", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json version is 2.1.0", "CHANGELOG 2.1.0 entry covers skill+hook+disable-flag", "guide.md stale note corrected", "README mentions usage skill and hook", "full plugin Pester suite green"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
